basic_details.job_title: IIT Indore Project Technical Support - III Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore) Project Technical Support - III Notification 2026 has been released on 06 July 2026 on the official website https://www.iiti.ac.in/. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Indore Project Technical Support - III Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. (with valid GATE) / M. Tech. Degree or equivalent in Biotechnology / Biochemistry / Microbiology / Life Sciences OR B.V.Sc. (with valid ICAR AIEEA-PG) OR B.Pharma (with valid GPAT) OR MBBS (with valid NEET PG) or in any other science and engineering stream
qualification.details: M.Sc. (with valid GATE) / M. Tech. Degree or equivalent in Biotechnology / Biochemistry / Microbiology / Life Sciences OR B.V.Sc. (with valid ICAR AIEEA-PG) OR B.Pharma (with valid GPAT) OR MBBS (with valid NEET PG) or in any other science and engineering stream

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Indore Project Technical Support - III Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 24-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Indore Project Technical Support - III Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 24-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Project Technical Support - III Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Indore Project Technical Support - III recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 24th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have an M.Sc. (with valid GATE) / M. Tech. Degree or equivalent in Biotechnology / Biochemistry / Microbiology / Life Sciences, or a B.V.Sc. (with valid ICAR AIEEA-PG), B.Pharma (with valid GPAT), MBBS (with valid NEET PG), or any other science and engineering stream.

faq.question: Q3. How can I apply for the Project Technical Support - III position?
faq.answer: Applications are accepted via email. You need to send your resume and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support - III role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 28,000 per month, plus 16% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Technical Support - III post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Indore located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Indore is located in Indore, Madhya Pradesh, with the pincode 453552.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual position. The job type is specified as contractual in the recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.
